plugins.name: r-pkg-dev
plugins.description: R package development conventions, guardrail hooks, and the r-btw MCP server, packaged for per-project reuse.

plugins.name: dev-crew
plugins.description: A crew of spec-writer, investigator, planner, builder, and reviewer subagents that drive an issue through spec (or investigate, for bugs) -> plan -> build -> QA, plus skills to refine an issue, run the pipeline, debug a bug, update a branch, create a local issue, address a PR, and merge a PR.
